videos.title: Saket Mishra from the Assocation for India’s Development
videos.description:
New England Schiller Institute Conference - December 7th, 2014

Saket Mishra from the Assocation for India’s Development and Atlas Corps, on the use of technology to solve medical and other problems in India.

videos.title: Meghan Rouillard on Vernadsky and the Noosphere
videos.description:
New England Schiller Institute Conference - December 7th, 2014

Meghan Rouillard from 21st Century Science and Technology Magazine gives a presentation on the science of Vladimir Vernadsky and his conception of the Noosphere

videos.title: State Rep. Andrea Boland on the Threats of EMPs. Dec 7th, 2014
videos.description:
New England Schiller Institute Conference - December 7th, 2014

Hon. Andrea Boland, State Representative from Sandford, ME, gives a presentation on the threats of elctromagnetic pulse on the U.S. electricity grid.

videos.title: Ben Deniston on what is Mankind?  Dec 7th, 2014
videos.description:
New England Schiller Institute Conference - December 7th, 2014

Ben Deniston from 21st Century Science and Technology Magazine, on the critical question, what is Mankind? And what is the difference between man and animal?  And how this relates to the need for the United States to collaborate with Russia, China, and India on scientific defense of humanity.

videos.title: Question and Answer. Panel 2. Dec. 7th, 2014
videos.description:
New England Schiller Institute Conference - December 7th, 2014

Question and Answer period from the second panel.

videos.title: Baifeng Sun, Confucius Institute, UMASS Boston
videos.description:
New England Schiller Institute Conference - December 7th, 2014

Baifeng Sun, Confucius Institute, UMASS Boston.  On developing cultural relations between the United States and China

videos.title: Cloret Carl Ferguson on Friedrich Schiller. Dec 7th, 2014
videos.description:
New England Schiller Institute Conference - December 7th, 2014

Cloret Carl Ferguson gives a presentation on Friedrich Schiller

videos.title: Excerpts from Mozart's Requiem. Dec. 7th, 2014
videos.description:
New England Schiller Institute Conference - December 7th, 2014

Schiller Institute Chorus performs excerpts of Mozart's Requiem Mass in D Minor
